<thought>

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<action>
FRENTE

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal, I should face right, which requires a counter-clockwise turn from down to right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
